repro_steps: Open settings popover from project/settings tests
expected: Single unique Settings trigger is interactable
actual: strict mode violation: Settings button matched 2 elements
hypothesis: UI now renders two Settings controls; E2E selector contract regressed.

expected: Project heading/combobox are visible on project landing
actual: Project heading and combobox locators not found within timeout
hypothesis: Project page layout/semantics changed; legacy selectors no longer match live UI.

expected: Ontology and Mappings rail buttons are visible
actual: Ontology rail button locator not found within timeout
hypothesis: Sidebar actions were renamed/relocated; E2E route-action assertions are outdated.

repro_steps: Try to fill Add command id input
expected: Command drawer exposes Add command id input
actual: Add command id input locator unresolved; test times out
hypothesis: Command drawer form semantics changed; accessibility label no longer matches test contract.

expected: Connection object is created or validation error is returned cleanly
actual: 500 INTERNAL_ERROR: ApplicationSettings has no attribute feature_flags

evidence.error_detail: ApplicationSettings object has no attribute feature_flags

hypothesis: Router accesses get_settings().feature_flags but settings model in runtime does not expose that attribute.

repro_steps: POST /api/v2/orchestration/builds/create with targetRid of created pipeline
expected: Build create returns proper success or pass-through 4xx permission error
actual: Endpoint returns 500 Internal while downstream failure is permission denied (403)

evidence.bff_log: Failed to create Foundry orchestration build: 403 Permission denied

hypothesis: Error mapping layer converts OMS permission failure into generic 500 instead of preserving authorization semantics.

repro_steps: Query target Order object status before/after
expected: Action execute should return execution evidence (action_log_id/auditLogId) and explicit branch semantics for closed-loop verification
actual: Action response now includes action_log_id/auditLogId/writebackStatus; writeback branch reflects ON_HOLD but main branch remains PENDING (branch consistency gap)
hypothesis: Execution evidence contract is fixed; remaining behavior is branch-scoped writeback not auto-promoted to main branch/read model.

expected: Single authoritative row per Order primary key showing latest action-applied status.
actual: Before fix, search could return duplicate rows (base + action overlay) for same order_id, causing stale PENDING to appear first and closed-loop validation to fail intermittently.

evidence.before_fix_symptom: duplicate rows for same order_id with conflicting statuses

hypothesis: OMS v2 object search lacked duplicate collapse for writeback-projected rows sharing the same primary key.

expected: Read-after-write should return target object via strong-consistency search.
actual: status=200; rows=0; found=false
hypothesis: Strong consistency header path or eq operator mapping does not guarantee read-your-write behavior.

expected: Read-after-write should return target object via strong-consistency search.
actual: status=200; rows=0; found=false
hypothesis: Strong consistency header path or eq operator mapping does not guarantee read-your-write behavior.
